{{Quote|Jonsey, pull the memory mods from the transmitters, Haku, set some charges.|Sergeant Major Hong gives orders|<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Haku''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] as of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. He was a member of the platoon assigned to [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]]. Along with [[Morley (stormtrooper)|Morley]], he was used as a demolitions expert while the crew took the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], [[AX-456]].
